title: Squirrel Removal in Highbridge, Bronx | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Highbridge, Bronx. Humane extraction, entry point sealing & damage repair. Licensed experts. Call for fast service!
intro: Highbridge residents know that squirrels can wreak havoc on older residential buildings and multi-family homes throughout the neighborhood. Our professional squirrel removal services protect your Highbridge property from these persistent rodents that commonly invade attics, walls, and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel extraction, exclusion, and prevention tailored to Highbridge's unique housing landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Highbridge for years, understanding the specific challenges posed by squirrels in this densely populated Bronx neighborhood. Our licensed technicians use humane removal methods and provide same-day emergency services to protect your family and property from squirrel damage and health risks.
localContext: Highbridge's proximity to Highbridge Park and the Harlem River creates an environment where squirrels thrive and frequently seek shelter in the area's classic pre-war apartment buildings and residential homes. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets near the historic High Bridge and older construction make properties particularly vulnerable to squirrel entry through deteriorated rooflines and vents.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Highbridge?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Highbridge typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, entry point sealing, and sanitation services. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Highbridge properties.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in Highbridge?
faqs.answer: Highbridge's abundance of mature trees in Highbridge Park and along residential streets provides ideal habitat for squirrels. The neighborhood's older buildings often have gaps, damaged soffits, and roof vulnerabilities that squirrels exploit for nesting, especially during fall and spring when they seek warm shelter.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to Highbridge homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage to Highbridge properties by chewing electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), destroying insulation, damaging HVAC systems, and compromising structural wood. They also carry parasites and create unsanitary conditions with their droppings, posing health risks to residents.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Highbridge property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Highbridge for urgent squirrel problems. Most removals take 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. Our process includes humane trapping, complete exclusion to prevent re-entry, and cleanup of contaminated areas to ensure your home is squirrel-free.
